title: China-to-Guyana Solar PV Inverter Compliance Gap Matrix
provenance: AI-compiled, multi-model cross-checked, not human-verified. Informational only; confirm with the official regulator and a qualified professional. Not legal/certification/customs/market-access advice.

rows.requirement: EMC and Power Quality — IEC 62920, IEC 61000 Series, and GPL Power-Quality Review
rows.target_requirement: Guyana does not publish a solar-inverter-only EMC regulation in the same way some larger markets do. In practice, EMC and power-quality evidence should be assembled from IEC inverter standards and the applicable GPL interconnection or project specification. GPL's National Grid Code includes power-quality requirements intended to prevent generators from degrading waveform quality before interconnection. For PV inverters, IEC 62920 is the dedicated EMC standard for PV power conversion equipment, while IEC 61000-series standards are commonly used for harmonic current emissions, immunity, flicker, and conducted/radiated EMC evidence.
target_standards: IEC 62920 — Photovoltaic power generating systems — EMC requirements and test methods for power conversion equipment
IEC 61000-3-2 — Electromagnetic compatibility — Limits for harmonic current emissions
IEC 61000-3-3 / IEC 61000-3-11 / IEC 61000-3-12 — voltage changes, flicker, and harmonic limits where applicable by equipment rating
GPL National Grid Code — power-quality requirements for generation interconnection
GNBS standards and conformity framework where adopted or required for imported electrical products
rows.china_equivalent: Chinese PV inverter EMC evidence is commonly prepared under GB/T 37408 and related domestic GB/T or NB/T test references, with testing by CNAS-accredited laboratories. These reports may use IEC 61000-series methods but are normally framed for China's domestic certification and 50 Hz grid environment. They do not automatically meet IEC 62920, GPL project power-quality review, or GNBS import/conformity expectations for Guyana.
china_standards: GB/T 37408-2021 — 光伏并网逆变器技术要求 (Technical Requirements for Photovoltaic Grid-Connected Inverters) — includes EMC-related requirements
NB/T 32004-2018 — 光伏并网逆变器技术规范 (Technical Specification for Photovoltaic Grid-Connected Inverters)
rows.gap: Gap: A China-only EMC certificate should be supplemented with IEC 62920 and applicable IEC 61000-series reports for the exact inverter model, power rating, firmware configuration, and grid setting. Harmonic and flicker results should be reviewed for Guyana's 60 Hz operating configuration and project point of interconnection. For larger GPL-connected or weak-grid projects, the project engineer may require additional harmonic studies, power-quality simulations, or mitigation equipment before interconnection approval.

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory in practice where required by GPL interconnection review, GNBS conformity/import review, or the project specification; exact IEC 61000 parts depend on inverter rating and connection conditions
mandatory_status.cn: Voluntary or project-dependent under China domestic certification practice; not transferable as Guyana EMC or power-quality acceptance

rows.verdict: [INFORMATIONAL] Do not rely on China GB/T 37408 EMC evidence alone for Guyana. Assemble IEC 62920 and applicable IEC 61000 reports, then confirm with GPL, GNBS, and the project engineer whether the reports cover the 60 Hz firmware profile and the actual point-of-interconnection conditions.

rows.requirement: GPL Grid Interconnection — 60 Hz Ride-Through, Anti-Islanding, and 120/240 V Settings
rows.target_requirement: Guyana Power & Light's National Grid Code applies to parties interconnected to the GPL system and includes an Interconnection Code and Minimum Technical Requirements for new generation facilities. The Grid Code states that GPL's network frequency objective is 60 Hz and defines normal and emergency frequency ranges, with renewable generation facilities subject to frequency ride-through, voltage ride-through, reactive power, power-quality, control, and modelling requirements. For distributed or customer-side PV, project owners should also confirm the applicable GPL/GEA interconnection route. Inverter settings must be configured for Guyana's 60 Hz / 120-240 V service context and the applicable point-of-interconnection voltage, not China's 50 Hz / 220-380 V baseline.
target_standards: GPL National Grid Code — Interconnection Code and Minimum Technical Requirements for generation interconnection
IEC 62116 — Utility-interconnected photovoltaic inverters — Test procedure of islanding prevention measures
IEC 61727 — Photovoltaic systems — Characteristics of the utility interface
IEC TS 62910 — Utility-interconnected photovoltaic inverters — Test procedure for low-voltage ride-through measurements
Guyana service context — 60 Hz, commonly 120/240 V low-voltage service; project settings must match the actual GPL point of interconnection
rows.china_equivalent: Chinese grid-connection evidence commonly includes GB/T 19964-2024 for PV power-station connection to the power system, NB/T 32004 inverter technical specifications, GB/T 37408 grid-connected inverter technical requirements, and domestic anti-islanding or ride-through test reports. These documents are prepared for China's 50 Hz grid and standard 220/380 V low-voltage conditions. They do not automatically demonstrate compliance with GPL's 60 Hz interconnection requirements, Guyana's low-voltage service context, or project-specific GPL/GEA approval conditions.
china_standards: GB/T 19964-2024 — 光伏发电站接入电力系统技术规定 (Technical Requirements for Connecting Photovoltaic Power Station to Power System)
NB/T 32004-2018 — 光伏并网逆变器技术规范 (Technical Specification for Photovoltaic Grid-Connected Inverters)
GB/T 37408-2021 — 光伏并网逆变器技术要求 (Technical Requirements for Photovoltaic Grid-Connected Inverters)
rows.gap: Gap: Chinese 50 Hz grid certificates and factory protection profiles do not transfer directly to Guyana. Exporters should prepare IEC 62116 anti-islanding evidence at 60 Hz, IEC 61727 utility-interface evidence, LVRT/FRT documentation where required by GPL, harmonic and power-quality evidence, and a firmware settings sheet showing voltage, frequency, reconnection, trip, and anti-islanding parameters for Guyana. Because GPL's Grid Code addresses weak-system issues such as short-circuit ratio and renewable generation controls, utility-scale or weak-grid projects may require project-specific studies and retesting beyond catalogue certificates.

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory where the inverter or PV generation facility is interconnected to the GPL system; exact studies, settings, and approval route depend on project size, point of interconnection, and GPL/GEA review
mandatory_status.cn: Chinese grid-connection evidence satisfies China domestic grid and certification needs only; it is not a substitute for GPL interconnection acceptance in Guyana

rows.verdict: [INFORMATIONAL] Treat Guyana as a 60 Hz grid market. Reconfigure and document inverter protection, reconnection, and anti-islanding settings for the actual GPL point of interconnection before submission or commissioning. Chinese 50 Hz / 220-380 V grid evidence should be treated as background only unless GPL, GEA, the project engineer, and GNBS accept specific supplementary test evidence.

rows.requirement: GEA Renewable-Energy Programme Context — Grid-Tied, Hinterland, and Utility Solar Projects
rows.target_requirement: Guyana's solar market is expanding through utility, public-sector, hinterland/off-grid, isolated-grid, and customer-choice renewable-energy programmes under the Guyana Energy Agency and Guyana's Low Carbon Development Strategy 2030. Grid-tied projects must be coordinated with GPL where they connect to GPL's system, while isolated and hinterland projects may use project-specific technical specifications. Guyana's rapid oil-led economic growth and power-sector expansion, including gas-to-energy and transmission investments, do not remove inverter compliance gates: projects still need the correct GNBS/GPL/GEA documentation and settings for the local 60 Hz system.
target_standards: Guyana Energy Agency renewable-energy programme information
GPL National Grid Code where a PV project interconnects to the GPL system
Project-specific employer's requirements for hinterland, isolated-grid, public-sector, or utility solar procurements
rows.china_equivalent: China's distributed and utility PV projects are governed by Chinese energy policies, grid company connection rules, and domestic technical standards such as NB/T 32004, GB/T 37408, and GB/T 19964. These are useful for describing a manufacturer's China track record but do not establish eligibility for Guyana public-sector tenders, GEA-supported programmes, GPL interconnection, or CARICOM-region project specifications.
china_standards: NB/T 32004-2018 — 光伏并网逆变器技术规范 (Technical Specification for Photovoltaic Grid-Connected Inverters)
GB/T 37408-2021 — 光伏并网逆变器技术要求 (Technical Requirements for Photovoltaic Grid-Connected Inverters)
GB/T 19964-2024 — 光伏发电站接入电力系统技术规定 (Technical Requirements for Connecting Photovoltaic Power Station to Power System)
rows.gap: Gap: Chinese project approvals and domestic certificates do not establish acceptance in Guyana's public, hinterland, isolated-grid, or GPL-connected solar programmes. Tender files should map each inverter model to the project specification, IEC safety and grid-interface reports, 60 Hz settings, tropical-environment ratings, spares/service obligations, and any GNBS import, inspection, or certification requirements. For off-grid or weak-grid hinterland projects, inverter-grid forming, battery compatibility, grounding, surge protection, and local maintenance evidence may be as important as grid-export certificates.

mandatory_status.target: Project-dependent; mandatory where stated in GEA/GPL programme rules, public tender specifications, project-owner employer's requirements, or GNBS import/conformity procedures
mandatory_status.cn: Chinese programme approvals and domestic project references are not transferable to Guyana

rows.verdict: [INFORMATIONAL] Guyana's solar demand is growing, but project route matters. Separate GPL grid-tied submissions from GEA-supported, public-procurement, isolated-grid, and hinterland/off-grid packages, and align each inverter configuration to Guyana's 60 Hz conditions. Do not present China project approvals as a substitute for Guyana project-owner, GNBS, GEA, or GPL requirements.

rows.requirement: IEC 62109-1 / IEC 62109-2 Safety Evidence — GNBS Conformity and Project Procurement
rows.target_requirement: The Guyana National Bureau of Standards is Guyana's national standards body and publishes standardisation, compliance, product-inspection, importer/manufacturer registry, and certification information. For PV inverters, exporters should expect GNBS, public procurers, GPL, GEA-supported projects, and private project owners to request internationally recognised electrical safety evidence. IEC 62109-1 and IEC 62109-2 are the core safety standards for power converters and inverters used in photovoltaic power systems. Evidence should identify the exact model, rating, firmware/hardware family, environmental ratings, markings, and installation limitations for Guyana's tropical and 60 Hz service context.
target_standards: IEC 62109-1 — Safety of power converters for use in photovoltaic power systems — Part 1: General requirements
IEC 62109-2 — Safety of power converters for use in photovoltaic power systems — Part 2: Particular requirements for inverters
GNBS standardisation, compliance, product inspection, and certification framework
Project-owner procurement requirements for public, utility, commercial, hinterland, or off-grid solar projects
rows.china_equivalent: China-side documentation commonly includes GB/T 37408 or NB/T 32004 test reports, CQC/CGC voluntary certification, factory quality-system documents, and CNAS laboratory reports. These can support technical due diligence but are China domestic references. They should not be represented as automatic substitutes for IEC 62109-1/-2 safety type-test evidence, GNBS conformity expectations, GPL interconnection documentation, or project-owner procurement requirements in Guyana.
china_standards: GB/T 37408-2021 — 光伏并网逆变器技术要求 (Technical Requirements for Photovoltaic Grid-Connected Inverters)
NB/T 32004-2018 — 光伏并网逆变器技术规范 (Technical Specification for Photovoltaic Grid-Connected Inverters)
CQC / CGC voluntary certification schemes for PV inverter products in China
rows.gap: Gap: China domestic safety evidence should be supplemented with IEC 62109-1/-2 type-test certificates and reports from an appropriately accredited laboratory, plus nameplate, installation manual, tropical-environment rating, surge-protection, grounding, and service documentation. If the inverter is reconfigured from China factory defaults to Guyana 60 Hz / 120-240 V settings, the safety file should identify whether the change affects ratings, protective functions, thermal performance, or certification model-family coverage.

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory where required by GNBS import/conformity review, public procurement, GPL/GEA project review, or project-owner specifications; IEC 62109 evidence is expected as the safety baseline for PV inverters
mandatory_status.cn: Voluntary or certification-scheme-dependent under China domestic practice; not a substitute for Guyana-facing IEC safety evidence

rows.verdict: [INFORMATIONAL] Use IEC 62109-1/-2 as the primary safety evidence package for Guyana-facing PV inverter submissions, and treat China GB/T or NB/T reports as supporting background only. Confirm the current GNBS conformity route and any project-owner safety documentation requirements before shipment, especially where firmware is changed from China's 50 Hz defaults to Guyana's 60 Hz configuration.
